title: tragacantha aboriginorum
intro: Tragacantha aboriginorum, also known as the Australian hair senna or native senna, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Tragacantha aboriginorum often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and pods, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the affected area.
